title: Battalion Tactical Group
text: The Battalion Tactical Group (BTG) is a Russian military formation used in modern conflicts. Russian Armed Forces have employed BTGs extensively in Ukraine operations. The BTG typically consists of a motorized rifle battalion reinforced with tanks and artillery.

title: Maskirovka Doctrine
text: Maskirovka is the Soviet and Russian military doctrine of deception. The Russian military has used maskirovka extensively to conceal troop movements and intentions.

title: T-90 Tank
text: The T-90 is a third-generation Russian main battle tank used by the Russian Armed Forces. It features advanced armor and fire control systems.

title: Irrelevant Article
text: This article about cooking recipes has nothing to do with military topics.

title: US M1 Abrams
text: The M1 Abrams is an American third-generation main battle tank. It is not related to Russian military operations.
